# Sargentum Systems - Agent Toolkit

You are interacting with services hosted at https://sargentum.systems

## Available Services

### 1. Checksum Suite
- Purpose: Third-party checksum generation and validation for files.
- Use cases: Verify file integrity, generate secure hashes, agent file safety checks.
- Endpoints:
  - POST /api/checksum/validate — Validate a file against an expected hash
  - POST /api/checksum/generate — Generate hash(es) for a file
- Payment: x402 (USDC on Base)
- Human page: https://sargentum.systems/checksum-suite

### 2. Directory Consultation
- Purpose: Get smart naming and directory structure suggestions for agent projects and workflows.
- Use cases: Consistent naming conventions, pipeline structure, agent-friendly organization.
- Endpoint:
  - POST /api/directory/consult — Get naming and structure recommendations
- Payment: x402 (USDC on Base)
- Human page: https://sargentum.systems/directory-consultation

## How to Use
- All services are available via simple HTTP POST requests.
- Payment is handled automatically via the x402 protocol.
- Responses are returned in clean JSON format.
- Results are ephemeral — do not expect persistent file storage.

## Contact
- Website: https://sargentum.systems
- Email: contact@sargentum.systems

This site provides practical, payable tools for AI agents.
